description: Planning session for Phase 3 extractor polish: picked audit harness as step 1 (measurement before mutation), defined corpus schema, dispatched labeling agent.

labels.notes: Chose to build the audit harness before touching regex/LLM code — explicit rationale (can't iterate without a baseline).

labels.key_phrase: keyword tier is conservative, LLM tier is high-recall. Unresolved in code

labels.key_phrase: so I don't burn context reading JSONL
labels.notes: Heuristic: delegate large-file labeling/parsing to subagents instead of reading raw data into main context.
